title: HR can sign in and reach HR dashboard
description: Verifies an HR user can log in with valid credentials and is routed to the HR dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the HR dashboard

title: HR can review a flagged claim and submit a final decision with a note
description: Verifies HR can open a Requires Attention claim, inspect AI judgment and per-receipt audit notes, adjust an approved amount, submit an Approve/Partial/Reject decision with an HR note, and see the status update confirmation.

steps.description: Click the link to open the HR dashboard
Click the Requires Attention bucket tab
Open a claim from the list for review
Scroll to the AI judgment and confidence section
Scroll to the per-receipt line items section
Open audit notes for a line item
Edit the approved amount for one line item to a valid different value
Select a final decision status of Approve, Partial Approve, or Reject
Fill an HR note into the HR note field
Verify a confirmation of the status update is visible

title: HR can create a new Active policy via Policy Studio upload pipeline
description: Verifies an HR admin can create a policy by entering required metadata and uploading a document, and the policy completes the Uploading→Analyzing→Saving pipeline and appears as Active in the policy library.

steps.description: Click the link to open Policy Studio
Fill a policy name into the policy name field
Select a department in the department field
Upload a valid policy document file in the policy document upload field
Wait for the upload pipeline to complete
Verify the new policy appears in the policy library and is marked Active

title: Employee can view claim details with complete audit trail information
description: Verifies an authenticated employee can open a claim from their claims list and view the full chain-of-evidence including original extraction, edits, per-receipt verdicts, and final HR decision when available.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the employee claims list
Click the first claim in the list
Verify the claim detail view displays audit trail sections for receipts, extracted data, and decision history

title: Logged-out user is blocked from HR pages and redirected to login
description: Verifies protected HR routes cannot be accessed while logged out and the user is redirected to the login page without exposing HR data.

steps.description: Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: HR can upload a new policy and see it appear in the library
description: Verifies an HR user can create a new policy by providing metadata and uploading a supported document and the policy appears in the policy library after processing completes.

steps.description: Click the link to open Policy Studio
Fill Policy QA Automation into the policy name field
Fill Finance into the department field
Upload a valid PDF or DOCX policy document file
Verify the policy appears in the policy library list

title: Employee cannot access HR dashboard pages
description: Verifies an authenticated employee attempting to access HR areas is blocked and does not see HR dashboard data.

steps.description: Verify the user is blocked from HR content and is routed away from the HR dashboard

title: User can log out and protected routes become inaccessible
description: Verifies logging out clears the session and prevents access to protected routes until logging back in.

steps.description: Click the link to open HR settings
Verify the user is redirected to the login page

title: HR can triage claims by switching buckets, searching, filtering, and viewing the pending list modal
description: Verifies the HR dashboard supports exception-based triage by switching between buckets, narrowing results with search and filters, and opening the full pending list modal.

steps.description: Click the Requires Attention bucket tab
Fill a search query into the claims search field
Select a valid AI status filter value
Click the control to view all pending requests
Verify a modal displaying the full pending requests list is visible

title: Login rejects invalid credentials
description: Verifies submitting the login form with incorrect credentials shows an authentication failure banner and does not log the user in.

steps.description: Fill invalid.user@example.com into the email field
Fill wrong-password into the password field
Verify an authentication failure banner is visible

title: HR can manage a policy end-to-end from list to deletion
description: Verifies an HR admin can filter and search the policy list, open a policy, edit its metadata and status, delete it with confirmation, and return to the list without the policy present.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Policy Studio
Select a policy status filter option
Fill a search query into the policy search field
Open the first policy in the filtered results
Fill a new policy name into the policy name field
Fill a department into the department field
Fill a version into the version field
Select a valid effective date in the effective date field
Change the policy status using the status dropdown
Confirm deletion in the confirmation modal
Return to the Policy Studio list
Verify the deleted policy no longer appears in the policy list

title: HR can search history and open a past claim with audit trail and export option
description: Verifies an authenticated HR user can search processed claims in history, open a claim detail, and access the settlement form export option.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the HR history page
Fill a search query into the history search field
Click the first matching claim in the history results
Verify the claim detail view shows an export settlement form control

title: Login form blocks submission when email is empty
description: Verifies submitting the login form with an empty email shows an inline email validation error and prevents login.

steps.description: Verify an inline email validation error is visible

title: HR can process a passed-AI-review claim from the triage bucket
description: Verifies HR can open a claim from the Passed AI Review bucket in read-only mode and complete the fast-path processing outcome without requiring edits.

steps.description: Click the Passed AI Review bucket tab
Open a claim from the list
Scroll to the evidence details section
Verify the claim is displayed in a read-only view with evidence details available

title: Employee can use demo quick-login to access employee dashboard
description: Verifies the employee demo quick-login signs the user in and routes them to the employee dashboard.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the employee dashboard

title: HR can open a claim evidence panel from the triage table
description: Verifies an HR reviewer can open a claim from the dashboard list and view the evidence panel for that claim.

steps.description: Click a claim row in the claims table
Verify a claim evidence panel is displayed with claim details

title: HR claim detail in history provides retrievable evidence and decision trail
description: Verifies HR can open a processed claim from history and see evidence elements (receipts and extracted fields) along with the final decision and any HR notes.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the HR history page
Click the first claim in the history list
Verify the claim detail view displays receipt evidence and a decision/notes section

title: Policy upload rejects unsupported file types
description: Verifies Policy Studio prevents selecting an unsupported file type for upload and shows a rejection or warning in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Policy Studio
Attempt to upload a policy file with an unsupported type
Verify a file type validation warning is displayed and the upload does not proceed

title: HR can filter and search policies to find an Active policy
description: Verifies HR can narrow the policy library using status filtering and search to locate an Active policy successfully.

steps.description: Click the link to open Policy Studio
Open the policy status filter controls
Select Active in the status filter
Fill a search query into the policy search field
Verify the policy list updates to show only policies matching the selected status and search query

title: Policy upload rejects files that exceed the stated size limit
description: Verifies Policy Studio blocks uploading an oversized policy document and shows a clear size validation warning in the UI.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Policy Studio
Attempt to upload a policy file that exceeds the stated size limit
Verify a file size validation warning is displayed and the upload does not proceed

title: HR can open a policy and change its status
description: Verifies HR can open a policy from the library, change its status, and see the updated status reflected in the library.

steps.description: Click the link to open Policy Studio
Open a policy from the policy library
Change the policy status to a different available status
Verify the policy shows the updated status in the policy library

title: HR can delete a policy after confirming deletion
description: Verifies HR can delete a policy via the confirmation step and the policy is removed from the policy library.

steps.description: Click the link to open Policy Studio
Open a policy from the policy library
Verify the deleted policy no longer appears in the policy library

title: HR can find a processed claim in history and open its detail view
description: Verifies HR can search history, open a past claim, and view the recorded final decision details in the claim detail view.

steps.description: Click the link to open HR history
Fill a search query into the history search field
Open a claim from the history list
Verify the claim detail view displays the final decision information and audit trail content

title: Login form blocks submission for invalid email format
description: Verifies submitting the login form with an invalid email format shows an inline email format validation error.

steps.description: Fill not-an-email into the email field
Verify an inline email format validation error is visible

title: HR can open a policy and persist basic metadata edits
description: Verifies an HR admin can open a policy, edit key metadata fields, save, and see the updated values on the same policy detail view.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Policy Studio
Open the first policy in the list
Fill a new policy name into the policy name field
Fill a department into the department field
Verify the updated policy name is visible on the policy detail view

title: HR cannot start a new policy upload with missing required metadata
description: Verifies Policy Studio blocks submission when required metadata is missing and shows a validation error.

steps.description: Click the link to open Policy Studio
Upload a valid policy document file in the policy document upload field
Submit the policy creation form without filling the required metadata fields
Verify a field-level validation error is displayed and the policy is not created

title: Employee can access claims list and open a claim detail for transparency
description: Verifies an employee can navigate to their claims list, open a claim, and see a complete immutable record including AI extraction, any employee edits, and final HR decision/notes.

steps.description: Click the link to open employee claims
Open a claim from the claims list
Verify the claim detail shows AI extraction details, any recorded employee edits, and final HR decision and notes

title: HR can change a policy status and see it reflected in the list filter
description: Verifies an HR admin can change a policy’s status and then filter the list to confirm the policy appears under the new status category.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Policy Studio
Open the first policy in the list
Change the policy status using the status dropdown
Return to the Policy Studio list
Select the status filter option that matches the new status
Verify the updated policy appears in the filtered policy list

title: Employee claims list supports opening multiple different claim details
description: Verifies an authenticated employee can open one claim, return to the claims list via in-app navigation, and open another claim without losing access to claim detail views.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the employee claims list
Click the first claim in the list
Click the in-app control to return to the claims list
Click a different claim in the list
Verify the second claim detail view loads and shows claim audit trail content

title: HR can filter policies by status and refine via search
description: Verifies an HR admin can use status filtering and name search together to narrow the policy list and see only matching results.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Policy Studio
Select the Active status filter option
Fill a search query into the policy search field
Verify only policies matching the selected status and search query are displayed

title: Login shows loading state during submission
description: Verifies the login form shows an in-progress loading indicator while the sign-in request is being processed.

steps.description: Verify a loading indicator is visible during login submission

title: HR delete policy requires explicit confirmation
description: Verifies an HR admin is prompted to confirm before a policy is deleted and can cancel deletion without removing the policy.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Policy Studio
Open the first policy in the list
Cancel deletion in the confirmation modal
Verify the policy detail view remains accessible after canceling deletion

title: HR history search can be cleared to restore full results
description: Verifies HR can type into history search to narrow results and then clear the search to return to the unfiltered history list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the link to open the HR history page
Fill a search query into the history search field
Verify the history list shows an unfiltered set of claims

title: Policy Studio supports returning to the list from an opened policy
description: Verifies an HR admin can open a policy and return back to the policy list using in-app navigation.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Policy Studio
Open the first policy in the list
Click the action to go back to the Policy Studio list
Verify the policy list is displayed

title: Policy Studio shows a usable empty state when search yields no results
description: Verifies the policy list provides an empty state when the user searches for a non-existent policy name.

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open Policy Studio
Fill a clearly non-matching search query into the policy search field
Verify an empty state is displayed indicating no policies match the search

title: Employee receipt upload and OCR extraction flow cannot be executed due to placeholder submit page
description: Verifies that the employee submit page currently does not provide the receipt upload and OCR extraction UI needed to complete the workflow.
category: WF2 - Employee Receipt Upload & OCR Extraction

steps.description: Click the navigation item to open the employee submit claim page
Verify the page does not provide receipt upload and claim submission controls needed to complete the workflow
